lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਬਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevaa safal hai banee |
lines.english: Service to the True Guru is fruitful and rewarding;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gurasikh har bolahu mere bhaaee |
lines.english: O GurSikhs, chant the Name of the Lord, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਪੀਛੈ ਛੂਟੀ ਘਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin har japiaa tin peechhai chhoottee ghanee |1|
lines.english: So many are emancipated along with those who meditate on the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jit mil har naam dhiaaeaa har dhanee |
lines.english: meeting Him, I meditate on the Name of the Lord, the Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਤ ਸਭ ਪਾਪ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bolat sabh paap leh jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, all sins are washed away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਬ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab gur miliaa tab man vas aaeaa |
lines.english: When one meets the Guru, then the mind becomes centered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਗ ਧੂਰਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur pag dhoor jinaa mukh laaee |
lines.english: Those who apply the dust of the Feet of the True Guru to their faces,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਗਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anadin nagaree har gun gaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Night and day, within the body-village, the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤ ਪੰਚ ਰਹੇ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat panch rahe har dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: The five passions, running wild, are brought to rest by meditating on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲ ਭਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: te har daragah mukh aoojal bhaaee |3|
lines.english: Their faces are radiant in the Court of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa aap har bhaavai |
lines.english: Service to the Guru is pleasing to the Lord Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੂੜ ਤਿਆਗੇ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tin koorr tiaage har liv laaee |
lines.english: renounce falsehood and enshrine love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਤਰਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੫॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh har aap taraavai |4|5|43|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself saves the Gurmukhs. ||4||5||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨੁ ਬਲਭਦ੍ਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਗ ਲਗਿ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: krisan balabhadru gur pag lag dhiaavai |
lines.english: Even Krishna and Balbhadar meditated on the Lord, falling at the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਜੋਗੀ ਡੰਡਾਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har aape jogee ddanddaadhaaree |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the Yogi, who wields the staff of authority.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har aape rav rahiaa banavaaree |
lines.english: The Lord Himself practices tapa - intense self-disciplined meditation;

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਮੇਰਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa meraa raam rahiaa bharapoor |
lines.english: Such is my Lord, who is all-pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਤਪੁ ਤਾਪੈ ਲਾਇ ਤਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har aape tap taapai laae taaree |1|
lines.english: He is deeply absorbed in His primal trance. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nikatt vasai naahee har door |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He dwells near at hand - the Lord is not far away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਧੁਨਿ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape sabad surat dhun aape |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the Word of the Shabad. He Himself is the awareness, attuned to its music.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape vekhai vigasai aape |
lines.english: The Lord Himself beholds, and He Himself blossoms forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਜਪਾਇ ਆਪੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har aap japaae aape har jaape |2|
lines.english: The Lord Himself chants, and the Lord Himself inspires others to chant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਆਪਿ ਪੀਆਵਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har amrit aap peeaavanahaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord is the Ambrosial Nectar; He Himself leads us to drink it in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਸਾਰਿੰਗ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aape saaring amritadhaaraa |
lines.english: He Himself is the rainbird, and the Ambrosial Nectar raining down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਆਪੇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har aap kare aape nisataaraa |3|
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the Doer; He Himself is our Saving Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aape guramatee nisataaraa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself, through the Guru's Teachings, saves us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਬੇੜੀ ਤੁਲਹਾ ਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aape berree tulahaa taaraa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the Boat, the Raft and the Boatman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੬॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: har aape naanak paavai paaraa |4|6|44|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself carries us across to the other side. ||4||6||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ਤੂੰ ਧਣੀ ਜੈਸੀ ਤੂੰ ਰਾਸਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਤੈਸੀ ਹਮ ਲੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: saahu hamaaraa toon dhanee jaisee toon raas dehi taisee ham lehi |
lines.english: O Master, You are my Banker. I receive only that capital which You give me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: ham vanajaare raam ke |
lines.english: I am the merchant, the peddler of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਣੰਜਹ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਜੇ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਦੇਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naam vananjah rang siau je aap deaal hoe dehi |1|
lines.english: I would purchase the Lord's Name with love, if You Yourself, in Your Mercy, would sell it to me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਾਹ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa har bhagat dhan khattiaa har sache saah man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: I have earned the profit, the wealth of devotional worship of the Lord. I have become pleasing to the Mind of the Lord, the True Banker.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਾਵੈ ਦੇ ਰਾਸਿ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har vanaj karaavai de raas re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I trade in the merchandise and capital of the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੀਏ ਅਨੰਤ ਤਰੰਗੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hor vanaj kareh vaapaaree anant tarangee dukh maaeaa |
lines.english: Those traders who trade in other merchandise, are caught up in the endless waves of the pain of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਖਰੁ ਲਦਿਆ ਜਮੁ ਜਾਗਾਤੀ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har jap har vakhar ladiaa jam jaagaatee nerr na aaeaa |2|
lines.english: I chant and meditate on the Lord, loading the merchandise of the Lord's Name. The Messenger of Death, the tax collector, does not even approach me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜੇਹੈ ਵਣਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇਆ ਫਲੁ ਤੇਹਾ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: oe jehai vanaj har laaeaa fal tehaa tin paaeaa |3|
lines.english: According to the business in which the Lord has placed them, so are the rewards they obtain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਣਜੁ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har vanaj so jan kare jis kripaal hoe prabh deee |
lines.english: People trade in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, when the God shows His Mercy and bestows it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਲੇਈ ॥੪॥੧॥੭॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak saahu har seviaa fir lekhaa mool na leee |4|1|7|45|
lines.english: Servant Nanak serves the Lord, the Banker; he shall never again be called to render his account. ||4||1||7||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਨਨੀ ਗਰਭੁ ਪਾਲਤੀ ਸੁਤ ਕੀ ਕਰਿ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jananee garabh paalatee sut kee kar aasaa |
lines.english: The mother nourishes the fetus in the womb, hoping for a son,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਦਾ ਦੇ ਆਪਿ ਹਥਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau har jan preet har raakhadaa de aap hathaasaa |1|
lines.english: In just the same way, the humble servant of the Lord loves the Lord, who extends His Helping Hand to us. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਹੋਇ ਧਨੁ ਖਾਟਿ ਦੇਇ ਕਰਿ ਭੋਗ ਬਿਲਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa hoe dhan khaatt dee kar bhog bilaasaa |
lines.english: who will grow and earn and give her money to enjoy herself.
